form.formComment: Resuming after three-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign fourth of 7 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw January 6 over 1500m, 4.5 len behind Dwayne carrying 57kg at $13. Previously first up; fifth of 10 at Taree Mdn-Sw December 23 over 1300m, 6 len behind Dark Justice with 57kg at $8. Looks well placed this line-up and can feature on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted out and bumped Valorizada.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at Coffs Harbour Mdn-Sw December 4 over 1010m, 1.4 len behind Mum Knows carrying 57kg at $5. When resuming last campaign sixth of 11 at Ballarat Synthetic Mdn-Sw June 13 over 1000m, 5 len behind Night Flash with 57.5kg at $4.80. Everything points to a positive return.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a four months break. Finished off last preparation third in a small field at Inverell Mdn-Sw December 26 over 1400m, soft track; 4 len behind Show Moment carrying 51.5kg at $5. On debut ran last of 10 at Dalby 3yo Mdn-Sw October 2 over 1000m, 16 len behind Little Fella carrying 56kg at $101. Happy to risk.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 600m, obliged to steady from the heels of Razor's Magic.
Began awkwardly, shifted in and hampered Kelbrelyn.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, 8th of 10 at Newcastle Mdn on March 31 over 900m, 6 len behind Lady Catalina carrying 57kg at $6.50. Last start set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 10 at Wellington F&M Mdn-Sw on April 10 over 1100m, 0.8 len behind She Thinks Ahead with 57.5kg at $3.30. Progressing well and is one of the major hopes.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 11 at Port Macquarie Ctry Mdn-Sw October 10 over 1000m, 3 len behind Angels Cloud carrying 53kg at $26. On debut second of 7 at Bowraville Mdn September 20 over 1000m, on rain affected going; a head behind Spoiler with 53kg at $14. Anticipating her to hit the ground running this campaign.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last of 7 at Orange Ctry Mdn-Sw February 9 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 5.5 len behind French Harp with 56.5kg at $21. Previously first up; ran last in a small field at Orange Mdn December 15 over 1000m, soft track; 9 len behind One Run Won with 56kg at $12. Form was not great last preparation and prefer to see how she returns.

form.formComment: Filly by Ocean Park facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a trial at Grafton over 945m on April 7. Wait and see what she can do.
